channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][CAST][发表] Anime News Network Mebius Dust 动画 宣布 6 声优阵容 Members LAMPs Team
item.description: Ayato Morinaga, Reina Aoyama, Satoshi Inomata, Shinnosuke Tokudome join cast ― The official website for Mebius Dust, Dōga Kōbō's original television anime based on Hajime Shinagawa's story of the... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Mebius Dust Anime Announces 6 Cast Members of LAMPs Team

item.title: [动画][PV][公开] Anime News Network Cyborg 009: Nemesis Anime的 Main 预告PV 公开 Sukima Switch的 Ending Theme Song
item.description: Sukima Switch's "Climal" serves as ending song for July 19 series ― The staff of Ishimori Production's Cyborg 009: Nemesis, a new anime based on Shōtarō Ishinomori's Cyborg 009 manga, started... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Cyborg 009: Nemesis Anime's Main Trailer Unveils Sukima Switch's Ending Theme Song

item.title: [动画][CAST][公开] Anime News Network My Stepmother Stepsisters Arent Wicked 动画 公开 2 More 声优阵容 Members

item.description: Maaya Uchida to perform ending theme song, voice Meru Tsumugina ― The official X/Twitter account for the television anime of Hekiru Hikawa's Hanaori-san Still Wants to Fight in the Next Life... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Hanaori-san Still Wants to Fight in the Next Life Anime's 2nd Promo Video Reveals Theme Songs

item.title: [公开] Anime News Network Singapore Studio Kasagi Labo 公开 Ars Gratia Project
item.description: Ilya Kuvshinov to direct, design characters for original sci-fi feature ― American animation news outlet Cartoon Brew reported that Singapore-based anime venture studio Kasagi Labo announced during... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Singapore Studio Kasagi Labo Reveals Ars Gratia Project

item.title: [动画][PV][公开] Anime News Network One Piece 动画 Remake的 1st 预告 预告PV 公开 Mayumi Tanaka的 Reprisal as Luffy (Updated)
item.description: Video previews Straw Hat crew for remake debuting worldwide in February 2027 ― Netflix unveiled during this year's Annecy International Film Festival on Wednesday the first teaser trailer for The One... | 来源: ANN | 原文: The One Piece Anime Remake's 1st Teaser Trailer Reveals Mayumi Tanaka's Reprisal as Luffy (Updated)

item.title: [动画][续作] Anime News Network Classroom Elite TV 动画 Gets 5th 季度
item.description: 4th season ended with episode 16 on Wednesday ― Kadokawa announced on Wednesday that production on a fifth Classroom of the Elite television anime season has been green-lit, and presented a new... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Classroom of the Elite TV Anime Gets 5th Season

item.title: [PV][CAST][STAFF][公开] MyAnimeList One Piece 公开 Returning Lead 声优阵容, 追加 制作阵容, 预告 宣传视频
item.description: The Annecy International Animation Film Festival 2026 unveiled the returning lead cast, additional staff, and teaser promotional video for WIT Studio's The One Piece anime remake on Wednesday. The... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'The One Piece' Unveils Returning Lead Cast, Additional Staff, Teaser Promo

item.title: [动画][发表] MyAnimeList Mixed Media Project Re:bel Robotica 宣布 TV 动画 改编
item.description: Amuse Creative Studio announced a television anime adaptation of illustrator Mika Pikazo's Re:bel Robotica mixed-media franchise on Wednesday, revealing a teaser visual (pictured). The teaser... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Mixed Media Project 'Re:bel Robotica' Announces TV Anime Adaptation

item.description: The 12th and final episode of Kanan-sama wa Akumade Choroi (Mistress Kanan is Devilishly Easy) ended with an announcement on Sunday that a second season is in production. The official website also... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Kanan-sama wa Akumade Choroi' Second Season in Production
